arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta offers worrying Bukayo Saka update for Liverpool clash after latest absence
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is facing a race against time to be available for Arsenal's clash with Liverpool and Mikel Arteta is not confident about having his forward back from injury

arts.ttl: Merson Says: Arsenal need to find calm or risk 'major trouble' vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Paul Merson questions if Arsenal can overcome their latest blip to restore faith in a sustained title chase this season, with table-topping Liverpool lying in wait on Super Sunday, while also heaping praise on Arne Slot's 'outstanding' start.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer admits Kai Havertz has 'proved me wrong' as the German goes in search of a record-breaking goal against Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League
arts.sum: The German is chasing a record eighth-straight game on the scoresheet at the Emirates, having impressed toward the end of his debut campaign in north London.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed strong VAR and red card warning before Liverpool with referee claim made
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has jokingly warned former Arsenal defender Lee Dixon after he started to suggest VAR and referees would treat his former side differently. "Three reds in eight games, people are saying, 'Are they going to get another one?' and that puts pressure on everybody, including - now I'm not saying the referees are going to - but all of a sudden you get an Arsenal game now and you're kind of having a little look at it.

arts.ttl: Arsenal blow as Arteta delivers Saka injury update ahead of Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta left Bukayo Saka out of his starting lineup to face Shakhtar Donetsk – and he may not recover from his injury in time to face Liverpool. The winger didn’t feature for the Gunners at the weekend when they tasted defeat for the first time this season, losing 2-0 away to Bournemouth […] The post Arsenal blow as Arteta delivers Saka injury update ahead of Liverpool first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'Strange' - Martin Odegaard feelings on William Saliba Arsenal red card crystal clear - football.london
arts.sum: The Norwegian also made his feelings around Saliba's red card crystal clear and urged his teammates to move on and "look at the next game". Odegaard said: "From my point of view it’s a different perspective watching our games on TV, and I think I can learn a lot from that as well.

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Arsenal-Shakhtar Donetsk, Real Madrid-Dortmund
arts.sum: The latest updates and analysis from matchweek three of the 2024-25 Champions League season, with Arsenal hosting Shakhtar Donetsk and Real Madrid facing Borussia Dortmund

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed unexpected William Saliba red card update with Man City and Liverpool twist
arts.sum: Before that huge title showdown, the Gunners face Shakhtar Donetsk in Champions League action at Emirates Stadium with Saliba available. Arsenal will have to navigate this weekend's Premier League clash against Liverpool without defender William Saliba.

arts.ttl: 20 Clubs With Most Premier League Red Cards since Arteta Joined Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal are among the most frequent offenders when it comes to receiving red cards in the Premier League since Mikel Arteta's arrival.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Zinchenko makes shock Man City allegation
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has claimed that Manchester City kept him on an academy deal until he had made 43 senior appearances for the club. "The City lawyers said: 'Look, this is an academy player contract, right?
